narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure drives crude toward $102, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY firms to 157.55; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite intervention risks. Sterling retreats to 1.3541 as UK political instability pushes yields above 5.1%, while EUR/USD falls to 1.1747 on a 175bp Fed-ECB disadvantage. Gold lower -0.61% near $4,700; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.30%; VIX 18.9. Watch US CPI at 12:30 UTC.
